content:
Character: Megan Shaw
Perception: Megan runs the coffee shop counter and she's one of the few adults who actually talks to me like a person — asks about school, remembers my order, once recommended a book. She's pretty in an easygoing way, always moving, always smiling. She's sharp and warm and I think she notices more than she lets on. She probably sees me as a regular kid, maybe a little quiet. I see her as the friendly constant in my daily routine. I know she works long hours. She once told me she's saving for something but didn't say what.

I see her as the friendly constant in my daily routine. I know she works long hours. She once told me she's saving for something but didn't say what.
